# PERF-060 positive: render.JSON composite literal allocated directly inside a Gin handler
lang: go
file: PERF-060-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin/render"
)

func RenderDirect(c *gin.Context) {
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	r := render.JSON{Data: gin.H{"ok": true}}
	r.WriteContentType(rec)
	r.Render(rec)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": rec.Code})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
